title: feat(finance): deepinfra provider, one-time events, shared sops loader
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Balancing the hive's books
gist.blurb: We've upgraded our internal finance tracker to automatically pull usage stats from DeepInfra and securely share API keys. Just making sure the pollen reserves are perfectly calculated.
gist.summary: Added DeepInfra cost tracking, one-time event handling, and a shared SOPS secrets loader to the internal finance runway tracker.
gist.impact: Internal operations can now accurately forecast DeepInfra usage and manage one-off financial events without duplicating API keys.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as an accountant. She wears tiny reading glasses and sits at a desk with a retro computer showing a spreadsheet. A small safe represents the shared secrets loader. The Nomnom creature is eating a stack of paper receipts.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny reading glasses, sitting at a wooden desk with a retro computer displaying a green spreadsheet. The round Nomnom creature happily eats a stack of paper receipts nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
